name: Pluak Daeng town center
notes: Primary civic and service core of Pluak Daeng. Important for community demand, worker services, and district-level errands.

name: CK Plaza Pluak Daeng
notes: Town retail and food cluster in central Pluak Daeng; useful as a destination and everyday service anchor.

name: Pluak Daeng Hospital
notes: District hospital supporting resident and worker catchments around central Pluak Daeng.

name: Bangkok Hospital Pluakdaeng
notes: Private hospital anchor for industrial workforce and family traffic on the Pluak Daeng side.

name: Amata City Rayong Industrial Estate
notes: Large industrial employment anchor west of Pluak Daeng with strong commuter, shift-change, and supplier traffic.

name: WHA Eastern Seaboard Industrial Estate 1
notes: Major industrial estate cluster north-west of central Pluak Daeng; strong demand from workers, logistics, and service fleets.

name: Eastern Seaboard Industrial Estate (Rayong)
source: industrial estate public facts + seed coordinate
notes: Industrial employment and logistics zone tied to the greater Pluak Daeng catchment.

name: Map Yang Phon service node
notes: Community and industrial-service node between Amata and the northern Pluak Daeng estates.
